sourcesUsed: https://www.findaphd.com (listing pages blocked; individual project URLs via search)
discoveryNotes: As of 2026-07-12, the September 2026 finance/accounting PhD funding cycle in England is largely closed (most deadlines were Dec 2025–Jun 2026). FindAPhD category pages returned HTTP 403 to automated access; jobs.ac.uk and official university pages were primary. Only verified OPEN funded offers are in phdOffers; evaluated closed/no-funding listings are in skipped arrays. Target 25+ open offers was not met without fabrication.

phdOffers.institution: University College Cork — Cork University Business School (CUBS)
phdOffers.title: CUBS PhD Scholarship 2026 — Management & Marketing (incl. ESG & Green Innovation)
phdOffers.subject: Fully funded PhD scholarship in organisational innovation, innovation strategy, green/ESG innovation, entrepreneurial ecosystems, or related management/marketing topics under Prof. Lawrence Dooley.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: EU tuition fees plus €25,000 annual stipend for 4 years; non-EU fee waiver applied for awardees. Updated 24 June 2026 on official page.
phdOffers.notes: Research areas include Grand challenges, ESG & Green Innovation (area V). Strong fit for Dina's compliance/ESG angle; broader than pure finance PhD.
